name: the handoff tells GCTP to enforce standards like CTP on both its own repo and the apps it builds
command: grep -q 'GCTP enforces standards like CTP' "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/docs/handoff-gctp-composite-engine.md" && grep -qi "GCTP's own repo" "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/docs/handoff-gctp-composite-engine.md" && grep -qi 'every app GCTP builds' "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/docs/handoff-gctp-composite-engine.md" && echo enforce-like-ctp 1>&2
